title: eriophyton anomalum
side_effects: Eriophyton anomalum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its volatile compounds may lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of its extracts may cause liver damage and gastrointestinal problems. Additionally, improper use of the plant may also trigger anxiety and other psychological disturbances in susceptible individuals.
